data.content:
Re-verified feature/knots-dab8-execution-plan-compat-v2 at 788e796 on 2026-04-18.
- rg -n beat_id src/ returns 0 hits.
- cargo test execution_plan: 41 tests passed, including serde legacy/canonical, db hot round-trip, sync apply (legacy+canonical), and update rehydrate.
- Branch already pushed to origin; commits 8c81d08 and 788e796 tagged on knot.
- Legacy beat_ids/unassigned_beat_ids keys deserialize via custom Deserialize impls; serialization emits knot_ids only.
